summary: Updated forge project justfile to use 15-command standard vocabulary as mixed project reference. Added project-type recipe (outputs mixed), 10 scoped recipes with bash case dispatch (compile, build, run, dev, test, lint, fmt, check, clean, install), 5 unscoped recipes (test-e2e, ci, e2e-setup, e2e-verify, project-type), and boundary markers. Preserved custom recipes (claude, claude-c) outside boundary markers. Created 15 e2e tests verifying all acceptance criteria.
keyDecisions: Mixed template uses init-justfile.md Mixed Template section as authoritative source for recipe bodies
Test TC-FJ-011 changed from asserting exit 0 (fragile: go vet fails at root without go.mod) to asserting no scope error (robust: validates dispatch correctness)
Custom recipes (claude, claude-c) placed before boundary markers to remain editable by users
e2e-setup and e2e-verify recipes copied from Mixed Template to replace existing project-specific versions

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All 15 standard commands present in justfile
10 scoped recipes use bash case dispatch
just compile frontend executes frontend compile only
just compile backend executes backend compile only
just compile executes both frontend and backend compile
